zh.title: 莫瑟韦尔危机逼近Hearts，Rangers争夺第二名形势紧张
zh.summary: Hearts有望在周三赢得自1960年以来的首个顶级联赛冠军，但必须应对剩余比赛，而Rangers则在争夺第二名。随着关键比赛的展开，苏格兰超级联赛的冠军争夺保持激烈竞争。

title: What is Scotland's most iconic goal? This time - Narey v McLean
summary: BBC Football is conducting a fan vote to determine Scotland's greatest goal, with historical matchups like Narey versus McLean featured. The interactive feature celebrates iconic moments in Scottish football history.
content: Vote to find out what goal will be crowned Scotland's greatest.

title: Bonuses, players on the beach & the phoney war - Pulis' end-of-season insights
summary: Tony Pulis discusses the unique managerial challenges of the end season, including motivating players with little remaining to play for. His insights examine the tactical and psychological complexities of late-season football management.
content: Tony Pulis on why motivating players who have nothing to play for is just one of the challenges facing a manager at the end of the season.

title: Football club owners charged with human trafficking
summary: Two football club owners, Barrie Drewitt-Barlow and his husband Scott, have been charged with serious offenses including sexual exploitation and rape. The charges represent a significant scandal affecting English football club ownership.
content: Barrie Drewitt-Barlow and husband Scott are accused of sexual exploitation and rape.

title: Podcast: Could this be the key weekend at the top and bottom of the Premiership?
summary: A podcast episode examines the upcoming weekend's Premier League fixtures and their significance for the title race and relegation battle. Hosts Andy Burke, Scott Allan, and Andy Halliday analyze key matchups and competitive implications.

title: Why Spurs fans face Arsenal dilemma
summary: West Ham's Sunday match against Arsenal carries significant consequences for Tottenham's title aspirations, creating a difficult situation for Spurs fans regardless of the outcome. The result will either strengthen a rival or eliminate Spurs from contention, making the fixture pivotal to their season.
content: Why Sunday's Premier League game between West Ham and Arsenal could be viewed as a nightmare for Tottenham - whatever the result.

title: Arbroath would retain part-time players in Premiership - Gold
summary: Arbroath's co-manager David Gold stated the club would retain part-time players if promoted to the Scottish Premiership, challenging conventional expectations for top-flight clubs. This reflects the financial realities and operational strategy of smaller clubs seeking promotion while maintaining sustainability.
content: Arbroath would continue to field part-time players if they were to gain promotion to the Scottish Premiership, believes co-manager David Gold.

zh.title: 阿布罗斯若升入超级联赛将保留兼职球员

title: Remembering 2012 - why Sunderland away means more to Man Utd than normal
summary: Manchester United fans remember 2012 as the year Sergio Aguero's dramatic goal won Manchester City the Premier League title, with the loss particularly stinging because it occurred at Sunderland. The upcoming Sunderland away fixture reignites painful memories of that historic championship loss.
content: Remembering how Sunderland fans laughed at visitors Manchester United in 2012 when Sergio Aguero's goal snatched the Premier League title away from them.

zh.title: 回忆2012年——为什么桑德兰客场对曼联的意义更加重大
zh.summary: 曼联球迷记得2012年是塞尔吉奥·阿圭罗的戏剧性进球帮助曼城赢得英超冠军的一年，这场失利尤其令人心痛，因为它发生在桑德兰。即将到来的桑德兰客场比赛重新唤起了这场历史性冠军失利的痛苦回忆。

title: England 2006: The Golden Generation - watch trailer
summary: A documentary explores England's 2006 World Cup campaign, examining how high expectations were derailed by on-field struggles and off-field controversies. The film reveals why what was supposed to be the nation's defining tournament moment instead ended in disappointment.

zh.title: 英格兰2006：黄金一代 - 观看预告片

title: Alexander-Arnold omission 'mind-boggling' to Rooney
summary: Wayne Rooney criticized Thomas Tuchel's final World Cup squad selection for excluding Trent Alexander-Arnold, calling the omission 'mind-boggling.' The decision sparked debate about tactical choices and squad composition ahead of the tournament.
content: Former England captain Wayne Rooney says it is "mind-boggling" that Trent Alexander-Arnold was left out of Thomas Tuchel's final squad before the World Cup.

zh.title: 阿历山大-阿诺德的缺席对鲁尼来说是"令人费解的"

summary: Wayne Rooney meets defender Phil Jagielka to reflect on their shared playing career and discuss Derby County's recent tumultuous period. The show provides personal perspective on both their footballing histories and the club's organizational challenges.
content: Wayne meets Phil Jagielka, from their playing days to surviving Derby County chaos.
